svg.title: EK-RAG enterprise knowledge product infographic — Octave dark showcase brand
svg.desc: Single-page architecture and workflow visualization for the Enterprise Knowledge RAG System, styled in the black-dominant Octave brand palette with neon accent highlights.
svg.text: From scattered enterprise content to a cited AI assistant
A single-page architecture and workflow view of how EK-RAG converts private company knowledge into governed, conversational answers.

g.text: and formats. Search is slow and manual,
and generic AI cannot cite or stay private.
A fully decoupled, local-first platform that turns
enterprise documents into cited, conversational AI.
Any format, unified by the EKDC converter
EKDC standardizes to Markdown; EKIE embeds and publishes governed vectors.
grounds the model, and governs every answer.
From question to cited answer, streamed live
Live-streamed stages · clearance-aware · tenant-isolated · fully cited
Governance and operating controls built in
Turn enterprise knowledge into an intelligent AI assistant.
Ask in plain language — get instant, cited, governed answers your teams can trust.
